name: Intentia Amoris v7 Zero Trust Control Map
critical_invariants: health endpoints can be public; all mutation/read endpoints require API key unless explicitly local-dev
media is never written before consent gate passes
partner feelings and hormones are blocked as claims without direct evidence
audit log is tamper-evident hash-chain JSONL
runtime fails closed in staging/prod without secrets
must_not: store partner private data without consent
claim hormone state without measured labs
use Telegram chat id role as volatile in-memory state only
